_comment: Cross-language constants verified to agree today (architecture-hardening.md PKT-7 gate 3 / findings F7, F21). Consumers: crates/futo-notes-model/tests/conformance.rs (imageExtensions, maxTitleLength), apps/tauri/src-tauri/src/filesystem_watcher.rs's test module (watcherSuppressionWindowMs), src/lib/constantsConformance.test.ts (all fields). The image set is canonical in crates/futo-notes-core/src/image.rs; packages/editor/src/images.ts is the sanctioned conformance-locked TypeScript hot-path mirror.
